reasoning: The control CCCS AC-5 focuses on the separation of duties, which is directly applicable to Kubernetes through RBAC configurations. Ensuring that no single user or service account has excessive privileges aligns with the principle of separation of duties. Kubernetes RBAC can enforce these principles by avoiding cluster-admin bindings, ensuring least privilege, and explicitly defining roles and role bindings that separate duties among different users and service accounts.
title: CCCS AC-5: Separation of Duties
